---
title: "Bird Cherry (Prunus padus)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Prunus*](/trees/genus/prunus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 147 - Bird Cherry](../147.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 180 — Bird cherry](../180.html) |  |
| [Tree 334 — Bird cherry](../334.html) |  |
| [Tree 362 — Bird cherry](../362.html) |  |
| [Tree 363 — Bird cherry](../363.html) |  |
